Autós kamera 70mai RC22 hátsó kamera:
	

	
	
	
	The 70mai RC22 Rear Car Camera gives you an overview of what's happening behind your vehicle. It records in Full HD, so it captures all the important details, such as the license plates of other cars. With a wide 130° angle of view, it covers the entire width of the road.
